scripts.name: ^!k:: message box
scripts.code:
MButton::
    if !MyMenuReady {
        Menu, MyMenu, Add, Open Chrome, OpenChrome
        Menu, MyMenu, Add, Open Notepad, OpenNotepad
        Menu, MyMenu, Add, Open Calculator, OpenCalc
        MyMenuReady := true
    }
    Menu, MyMenu, Show
return

OpenChrome:
    Run, chrome.exe
return

OpenNotepad:
    Run, notepad.exe
return

OpenCalc:
    Run, calc.exe
return
